name: proc_creation_win_apt_mint_sandstorm_manage_engine_susp_child_process
raw_query: any where ((process.parent.executable like~ ("*manageengine*", "*ServiceDesk*")) and process.parent.executable:"*\\java*") and (((process.executable like~ ("*\\powershell.exe", "*\\powershell_ise.exe")) and ((process.command_line like~ ("* echo *", "*-dumpmode*", "*-ssh*", "*.dmp*", "*add-MpPreference*", "*adscredentials*", "*bitsadmin*", "*certutil*", "*csvhost.exe*", "*DownloadFile*", "*DownloadString*", "*dsquery*", "*ekern.exe*", "*FromBase64String*", "*iex *", "*iex(*", "*Invoke-Expression*", "*Invoke-WebRequest*", "*localgroup administrators*", "*o365accountconfiguration*", "*samaccountname=*", "*set-MpPreference*", "*svhost.exe*", "*System.IO.Compression*", "*System.IO.MemoryStream*", "*usoprivate*", "*usoshared*", "*whoami*")) or process.command_line:"SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['[-/–][Ee^]{1,2}[ncodema^]', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\s[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{15,}']), flags=set())" or process.command_line:"SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['net\\s+user']), flags=set())" or process.command_line:"SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['net\\s+group']), flags=set())" or process.command_line:"SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['query\\ssession']), flags=set())")) or (process.command_line:"*lsass*" and (process.command_line like~ ("*procdump*", "*tasklist*", "*findstr*"))) or ((process.executable:"*\\wget.exe" and process.command_line:"*http*") or (process.executable:"*\\curl.exe" and process.command_line:"*http*") or (process.command_line like~ ("*E:jscript*", "*e:vbscript*")) or (process.command_line:"*localgroup Administrators*" and process.command_line:"*/add*") or (process.command_line:"*net*" and (process.command_line:"*user*" and process.command_line:"*/add*")) or ((process.command_line:"*reg add*" and process.command_line:"*DisableAntiSpyware*" and process.command_line:"*\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender*") or (process.command_line:"*reg add*" and process.command_line:"*DisableRestrictedAdmin*" and process.command_line:"*CurrentControlSet\\Control\\Lsa*")) or (process.command_line:"*wmic*" and process.command_line:"*process call create*") or (process.command_line:"*wmic*" and process.command_line:"*delete*" and process.command_line:"*shadowcopy*") or (process.command_line:"*vssadmin*" and process.command_line:"*delete*" and process.command_line:"*shadows*") or (process.command_line:"*wbadmin*" and process.command_line:"*delete*" and process.command_line:"*catalog*"))) and (not (process.command_line:"*download.microsoft.com*" and process.command_line:"*manageengine.com*" and process.command_line:"*msiexec*"))
